summary: Ocean2Joy v2.0 content/legal directive — 12/12 backend tests PASS; all targeted public-page frontend assertions PASS (Homepage, HowItWorks, Services, ServiceDetails/custom-video, Contact, Policies/terms, Footer). ProjectDetails UI (service_type select + detailsExpanded default) not verified live because the seeded client@test.com account currently has 0 projects in this environment, but PATCH service_type behavior and timeline stage labels (10='Payment Reported', 11='Payment Confirmed') are fully verified via API.
action_items: Main agent can self-verify ProjectDetails UX live (service_type <select data-testid='project-service-type-select'> + Brief & attachments collapsible expanded by default) — just login as client, create a new project, open its page. Backend + PATCH gating already confirmed.
critical_code_review_comments: POLICIES dict is 300+ lines of content literals inside public.py — consider moving to JSON/MD files under /app/backend/data/policies/ and loading at startup. Keeps route file focused and enables diffable content review.

PATCH /api/projects/{id} only rejects the patch if invoice_sent_at is already set; it does not reject a service_type change while other stage fields (order_activated_at) are set. If that's acceptable for the pre-invoice window, fine — otherwise tighten the gate.
Test harness note: POST /api/projects is multipart/form-data (Form-based), not JSON. Worth documenting or normalising to a single content-type to avoid confusion for API consumers.
documents.py is 2,443 lines and has both HTML and TXT templates inline — exceeds the 700-line guideline and should be split per-document-type module (invoice.py, payment_instructions.py, etc.).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on directly-verified public pages; ProjectDetails UX deferred (no seed project for client@test.com)

seed_data_creation: Tests register fresh TEST_v2_<hex>@test.com clients per module and create disposable projects (TEST_v2_*) to verify PATCH service_type gating and invoice flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite for v2.0 content/legal directive lives at /app/backend/tests/test_v2_content_directive.py. Run with: export $(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL /app/frontend/.env | xargs) && pytest /app/backend/tests/test_v2_content_directive.py -v. Covers: policy substantive_version_date=2025-10-21, terms §3/§12 rewording, digital_delivery no-3rd-party-storage, refund Post-Stage-11 heading, privacy §9 Portal-First + §10 Semi-Manual, OPERATIONAL_CHAIN_STAGES 10/11 display_name rename (status_keys intact), PATCH /api/projects service_type whitelist + invoice_sent_at gate, invoice PDF/HTML/TXT + payment_instructions template wording ('Report Payment', no 'Mark Payment Sent'). Public pages already verified in browser: Homepage, /how-it-works (FAQ + 7-item JSON-LD), /services, /services/custom-video, /contact, /policies/terms (DD/MM/YYYY 21/10/2025), footer portal-first line.

frontend.project_details_service_type_select_and_: NOT_VERIFIED — client@test.com has 0 existing projects in this env; main agent can self-check.
